login.title: CoFoundery Align
login.subtitle: Sign in with a magic link if you already have access.
login.invitationSignupHint: This invitation can create a new profile via magic link.
login.newUserHint: If you are new, please start with your access code.

errors.magicLinkFailed: The magic link could not be confirmed. Please request a new link.
errors.authCallbackFailed: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.

start.title: Start CoFoundery
start.subtitle: New access is currently available by access code only.
start.existingAccess: If you already have access, you can sign in directly.

status.sent: If the details match, we will send you a magic link. Please also check your spam folder.
status.invalid: Access could not be opened. Please check your details or request access.
status.sendFailed: The magic link could not be sent right now. Please try again.

magicLinkForm.hint: Note: The login magic link is valid for 60 minutes.
magicLinkForm.sentExisting: If an account exists, we will send you a link. If you are new, please use "Get started".
magicLinkForm.sentInvitation: If the email matches the invitation, we will send you a link.
magicLinkForm.configurationError: Login configuration is incomplete. Please check the public app URL.
